content: The Self-Refine iterative self-improvement framework can be grounded by multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to solve its hidden blind spot: when refining from a single initial output perspective, the LLM can never catch inconsistencies or flaws it inherently cannot recognize from its single framing. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while improving output quality by leveraging diverse inconsistent perspectives to generate more robust self-feedback.
